description_long: This is a medium-sized, round pumpkin with a prominent, slightly curved stem at the top. The pumpkin's surface is ribbed and textured, displaying a natural orange coloration with subtle shading variations. On one side, there is a carved face featuring jagged, triangular eyes and a wide, toothy mouth, giving it a classic jack-o'-lantern appearance. The carving is rough and expressive, with deep cutouts that penetrate the pumpkin's shell. The rest of the pumpkin is uncarved, showing the natural, slightly matte skin and some minor imperfections. The base of the pumpkin is slightly flattened, allowing it to rest stably on flat surfaces.
description: A round, orange pumpkin with a curved stem and a jagged, expressive jack-o'-lantern face carved into one side. The surface is ribbed and matte, with natural shading and a stable base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved jack-o'-lantern face with jagged eyes and mouth, and the stem clearly visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the uncarved, ribbed surface and the stem angled to the left; the carved face is not visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fully uncarved, rounded back of the pumpkin with the stem centered at the top.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the stem and a partial glimpse of the carved face, with the rest of the pumpkin's natural surface visible.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with jagged, triangular eyes and a wide, toothy mouth cut out of the pumpkin's surface. The carving is rough and expressive, with deep cutouts and no additional motifs or etchings.
